---
title: "ojs"
format: html
---


```{ojs}
infodolar = FileAttachment("_historico_infodolar.csv")
  .csv({ typed: true })
  
br = infodolar
  .filter(row => row.entidad === "Banreservas")
  .map(row => {
    const mean = (row.compra + row.venta) / 2
    return({...row, mean: mean})
  })
```

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
  y: { domain: [59, 63] },
  x: { type: "time" },
  marks: [
    Plot.areaY(br, {x: "date", y1: "compra", y2: "venta"}),
    Plot.lineY(br, {x: "date", y: "mean", stroke: "red"})
  ]
})
```

```{ojs}
viewof selectedEntidad = Inputs
  .select([...new Set(infodolar.map(d => d.entidad))], { label: "Select Entidad" })
```

```{ojs}
to_plot = infodolar
  .filter(d => d.entidad === selectedEntidad)
  .map(row => {
    const mean = (row.compra + row.venta) / 2
    return({...row, mean: mean})
  })

Plot.plot({
  y: { domain: [59, 63] },
  x: { type: "time" },
  marks: [
    Plot.lineY(to_plot, {x: "date", y: "compra", stroke: "blue"}),
    Plot.lineY(to_plot, {x: "date", y: "venta", stroke: "green"})
  ]
})
```
